message:
✨ Add fish type drill-down with tank mate recommendations (#24)

Replace flat 289-product fish grid with a two-level browsing experience:
- Type grid groups fish by species (Guppies, Tetras, Corydoras, etc.) with
  temperament badges, swim level, price ranges, and selection counts
- Drill-down view shows individual varieties within a type with multi-select
- Tank mate recommendations appear after selecting fish, using existing
  compatibility data (temperament, swim level, water parameters)
- Compatibility warnings shown inline on variety cards when conflicts exist
  with already-selected fish from other types

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
